summary: Blog Newsletter Feature - All Tests Passed (100%). Backend: POST /api/ai/generate-blog-seo returns all 7 fields (seo_title, seo_description, excerpt, tags, seo_keywords, cta_text, cta_microcopy). POST /api/newsletter/send-bulk works with html_content and test_mode=true. Frontend: Blog list shows 'Send as Newsletter' paper plane icon on Published posts only. Newsletter modal (data-testid='newsletter-modal') shows subject line, email preview with title/cover/excerpt/tags/CTA, test mode toggle, and send button. Blog modal has 4 working tabs (Basics, Content, Media, SEO). Content tab 'Generate Blog Post Metadata' opens AI overlay with 7 selectable sections. Modal theme matches Armory - same tab bar underline style, same field components, same footer layout.

tests: POST /api/blog with cta_text and cta_microcopy - PASS
Published post has newsletter eligible fields - PASS

Email preview contains excerpt text

AI overlay has 'Apply Selected' button showing count

Modal theme matches Armory (tab underline, field components, footer layout)
